pi_items.source: Confirmed in export_result.sh (RESULT_FILE variable) and verifier.py (result_path default). Live tested: export script produces valid JSON at this path.
Confirmed in setup_task.sh which creates this file. Live verified: file exists at 6316 bytes, owned by ga:ga, permissions 644.
Confirmed in directive file Section 1: 'Vacancy Name: Senior DevOps Engineer - Q2 2025'. Verifier checks for substring 'Senior DevOps Engineer' in vacancy name.
Confirmed in directive file Section 2 candidate #1 and Section 3 hiring decision: 'OFFER — Rajesh Krishnamurthy'. Export script queries ohrm_job_candidate WHERE first_name='Rajesh'.
Confirmed in directive file and export script queries using last_name='Krishnamurthy'.
Confirmed in directive Section 3: 'REJECT — Elena Vasquez-Torres'. Export script queries ohrm_job_candidate WHERE first_name='Elena'.
Confirmed in directive file and export script.
Confirmed in directive Section 2 candidate #3 and Section 3: 'Thomas Andersson does not meet the minimum 5-year experience requirement'.
Confirmed in directive file.
Confirmed in directive Section 4: 'Job Title: Senior DevOps Engineer'. Live verified: job title exists in ohrm_job_title (id=9, is_deleted=0). Verifier checks for 'devops' substring in job title.
Confirmed in directive Section 4: 'Department: Engineering'. Live verified: department exists in ohrm_subunit (id=2, unit_id=ENG). Verifier checks for 'engineering' substring.
Confirmed in directive Section 4: 'Work Email: rajesh.krishnamurthy@gymcorp.com'. Verifier checks for 'rajesh' and '@' in work email.
Confirmed in directive Section 4: 'Work Phone: 646-555-0147'. Export reads emp_work_telephone column.
Confirmed in directive Section 4: 'Name: Priya Krishnamurthy'. Verifier checks for 'priya' substring in emergency contact name. Export reads from hs_hr_emp_emergency_contacts.eec_name.
Confirmed in directive Section 4: 'Relationship: Spouse'. Export reads eec_relationship column.
Confirmed in directive Section 4: 'Home Phone: 646-555-0148'. Export reads eec_home_no column.
Confirmed in directive Section 4: 'Pay Grade: Grade D - DevOps Senior'. Export queries ohrm_pay_grade WHERE name='Grade D - DevOps Senior'. Setup cleans any pre-existing grade with this name.
Confirmed in directive Section 4: 'USD Minimum: $95,000'. Verifier uses ±$5,000 tolerance. Export reads from ohrm_pay_grade_currency WHERE currency_id='USD'.
Confirmed in directive Section 4: 'USD Maximum: $145,000'. Verifier uses ±$5,000 tolerance.
Confirmed in directive Section 4: 'Salary: $120,000.00 USD'. Verifier uses ±$5,000 tolerance. Export reads from hs_hr_emp_basicsalary.ebsal_basic_salary.
Confirmed in directive Section 4: 'Annual Leave: 20 days'. Live verified: Annual Leave type exists (id=1). Verifier checks for >=19.5 days. Export sums no_of_days from ohrm_leave_entitlement.
Confirmed in directive Section 4: 'Sick Leave: 10 days'. Live verified: Sick Leave type exists (id=2). Verifier checks for >=9.5 days.
Confirmed in directive Section 4: 'Reviewer: James Anderson (EMP001)'. Live verified: employee EMP001 exists (James Anderson). Export queries ohrm_reviewer joined to hs_hr_employee.employee_id.
Live verified: SELECT emp_firstname, emp_lastname FROM hs_hr_employee WHERE employee_id='EMP001' returns 'James Anderson'.
Confirmed in directive Section 4: 'Review Period: April 1, 2025 – June 30, 2025'. Verifier checks for '2025-04-01' substring.
Confirmed in directive Section 4: 'Review Period: April 1, 2025 – June 30, 2025'. Verifier checks for '2025-06-30' substring.
Confirmed in directive Section 4: 'Due Date: July 15, 2025'. Verifier checks for '2025-07-15' substring.
Confirmed in verifier.py: passed = score >= 60.

privileged_info_summary: This is a full recruitment-to-onboarding pipeline task using synthetic data in OrangeHRM 5.8. The agent must: (1) Create vacancy 'Senior DevOps Engineer - Q2 2025' in Recruitment module; (2) Add 3 candidates: Rajesh Krishnamurthy (rajesh.k@techhire.com, 555-0147), Elena Vasquez-Torres (elena.vt@techhire.com, 555-0283), Thomas Andersson (thomas.a@techhire.com, 555-0391); (3) Shortlist Rajesh and Elena (not Thomas — insufficient experience); (4) Schedule interview for Rajesh with James Anderson on March 24, 2025; (5) Offer Rajesh, reject Elena; (6) Hire Rajesh (creates employee record); (7) Onboard: set job title to 'Senior DevOps Engineer' and department to 'Engineering', work email rajesh.krishnamurthy@gymcorp.com, work phone 646-555-0147; (8) Add emergency contact: Priya Krishnamurthy, Spouse, phone 646-555-0148; (9) Create pay grade 'Grade D - DevOps Senior' with USD range $95,000-$145,000, assign salary $120,000; (10) Add leave entitlements: 20 days Annual Leave, 10 days Sick Leave for current year; (11) Schedule performance review: reviewer James Anderson (EMP001), period 2025-04-01 to 2025-06-30, due 2025-07-15. Key verified facts: Admin credentials are admin/Admin@OHrm2024!, job title id=9, Engineering dept id=2, Annual Leave type id=1, Sick Leave type id=2. The OrangeHRM recruitment status workflow requires going through each stage: Application Initiated → Shortlisted → Interview Scheduled → Interview Passed → Job Offered → Hired. The ohrm_job_candidate_vacancy.status field stores status strings. Reviewers are in ohrm_reviewer table (not reviewer_number column). Do-nothing score is 0.
